hero.description: DROGA Physiotherapy is the biggest physiotherapy clinic in Ethiopia.

specialOffer.title: SPECIAL OFFER
specialOffer.description: Your first consultation session. Limited slots available this month.

about.subtitle: ABOUT US
about.title: DROGA PHYSIOTHERAPY SPECIALITY CLINIC
about.description: Droga Physiotherapy Specialty Clinic was established in 2015 in Addis Ababa by a group of health care professionals, who have an interest in developing the scientific background of physiotherapy in Ethiopia.

services.title:
Physiotherapy Examination 
 and Consultation
services.description: Comprehensive assessment of your physical condition, including medical history review, posture analysis, and functional movement screening to develop a personalized treatment plan.

services.title:
Manual 
 Therapy
services.description: Hands-on techniques used to mobilize joints, massage soft tissues, and manipulate muscles to reduce pain, improve flexibility, and restore normal movement patterns.

services.title:
Exercise & 
 Movement Therapy
services.description: Customized therapeutic exercise programs designed to strengthen muscles, improve range of motion, enhance stability, and correct biomechanical imbalances.

services.title:
Electro- Therapeutic 
 Modalities
services.description: Application of specialized therapies such as TENS, ultrasound, and electrical muscle stimulation to relieve pain, reduce inflammation, and accelerate tissue healing.

services.title:
Advanced 
 Procedures
services.description: State-of-the-art therapeutic interventions including shockwave therapy, laser therapy, and dry needling for targeted treatment of chronic pain and acute sports injuries.

services.title:
Complementary 
 Procedures
services.description: Integrative treatments such as cupping, taping, and acupuncture designed to support the primary rehabilitation plan and promote overall physical well-being.

testimonials.name: Ermiyas T.
testimonials.quote: Droga Physiotherapy Clinic gave me my life back. I came in with severe lower-back pain that had been affecting my work and sleep for months. The therapists took time to understand my condition, created a personalized treatment plan, and guided me through every step. After a few sessions, the improvement was unbelievable. I can now move freely and pain-free. Highly recommended!

testimonials.name: Aster B.
testimonials.quote: I am very impressed with the professionalism and care at Droga Physiotherapy Clinic. The team is friendly, knowledgeable, and truly dedicated to patient recovery. Their modern equipment and clean environment made every visit comfortable. I felt supported from my first consultation to my final session. This clinic is definitely the best choice for physiotherapy.

testimonials.name: Semira Mukhtar
testimonials.quote: As an athlete, I needed a physiotherapy clinic that understood sports injuries — and Droga Physiotherapy Clinic exceeded my expectations. They helped me recover from a knee injury and guided me through strengthening exercises that improved my performance. I’m now back on the field stronger than ever. Thank you to the entire Droga team for their outstanding care!
